title: Add lint error when connecting real to an AND gate

features.name: real type input to built-in gate primitive
features.description: Code should include a real-typed signal used as input to a built-in gate primitive (and/or/xor/nand/nor/xnor)

features.name: undeclared signal in gate instantiation
features.description: Code should include an undeclared signal used in a gate instantiation
